esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
// Aggregate across HTTP stat_prefixes (ingress_http, admin) — add more COALESCE terms as needed
| EVAL total_rq = COALESCE(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_completed, 0::long)
    + COALESCE(envoy.http.admin.downstream_rq_completed, 0::long)
| EVAL success_rq = COALESCE(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_2xx, 0::long)
    + COALESCE(envoy.http.admin.downstream_rq_2xx, 0::long)
| WHERE total_rq > 50
| EVAL error_rate = TO_DOUBLE(total_rq - success_rq) / TO_DOUBLE(total_rq) * 100.0
| STATS max_error_rate = MAX(error_rate)
// Healthy: < 1%; Unhealthy: > 5%. Adjust threshold for your SLO.
| WHERE max_error_rate > 5.0
